summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChurnGuard AI landing page. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend mostly functional with excellent UI/UX, but PostHog analytics integration has loading issues.

integration_issues.issue: PostHog analytics not loading properly - window.posthog is undefined despite initialization flag being true
integration_issues.impact: Analytics tracking not working, user behavior data not being collected
integration_issues.details: PostHog initialized flag shows true but actual PostHog object is not available. Console shows 404 and 401 errors related to PostHog.

passed_tests: Backend email subscription endpoint (/api/subscribe) - working with Resend integration
Backend email validation - properly rejects invalid emails with 422
Backend CORS headers - properly configured for cross-origin requests
Shield logo renders correctly in navbar with orbiting node animation
Shield logo renders correctly in footer with ambient effects (14 glow elements found)
Email subscription form submits successfully and shows success message
Comparison table displays with all 11 feature rows and proper checkmarks
Theme toggle works correctly between dark and light modes
All GitHub links (7 found) point to correct URL: github.com/ShreyasDasari/churnguard-ai
All Demo links (3 found) point to correct URL: churn-guard--shreyasdasari.replit.app
Mobile responsive navbar works perfectly with toggle menu
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix PostHog analytics integration - PostHog object not loading despite initialization. Check PostHog API key, network connectivity, or consider alternative analytics solution. All other features working perfectly.
